news.title: 'Will Return To India By Early Next Year': Lalit Modi After Tribunal Verdict
news.excerpt: Referring to the ruling, Lalit Modi, who lives abroad, said his 16-year-long legal fight has come to fruition.

news.excerpt: The highly competitive fellowship will support Bathineni's three-year doctoral programme.

news.title: "152 Paper Leaks In 10 Years, Zero Convictions": Rahul Gandhi Targets Government
